question: Does the Tangerine World Mastercard cover rental cars?
reference: Yes. The World Mastercard's Rental Car Collision/Loss Damage Waiver covers damage or theft when you pay for the whole rental on the card and decline the agency's waiver, for rentals up to 31 consecutive days.
response: Tangerine World Mastercard — Rental Car Collision/Loss Damage Waiver: Covers damage or theft to most rental vehicles when you decline the rental agency's collision waiver. Limit: Up to the actual cash value of the rental vehicle; rental period must not exceed 31 consecutive days. Eligibility: Reserve and pay for the entire rental with the card and decline the agency's CDW/LDW.
context:
[kb-09] Tangerine World Mastercard — Rental Car Insurance: The Rental Car Collision/Loss Damage Waiver covers damage to or theft of an eligible rental vehicle when you reserve and pay for the entire rental with the card and decline the rental agency's collision damage waiver. The rental period must not exceed 31 consecutive days. Exotic and luxury vehicles, cargo vans, and vehicles older than 12 years are not covered.
[kb-07] Tangerine World Mastercard — Overview: The Tangerine World Mastercard is a no-annual-fee premium card on the Mastercard network. Eligibility requires a minimum personal income of CAD 60,000 or household income of CAD 100,000. It earns the same 2% category cash back as the Money-Back card and adds premium travel and insurance benefits, including mobile device insurance, rental car collision/loss damage waiver, travel medical emergency insurance, and Boingo Wi-Fi access.
[kb-08] Tangerine World Mastercard — Mobile Device Insurance: Mobile Device Insurance covers loss, theft, or accidental damage to a new mobile device when the full retail purchase price is charged to the Tangerine World Mastercard. Coverage is up to CAD 1,000 per claim, with the covered amount depreciating over a two-year period. Devices costing more than CAD 1,000, cosmetic-only damage, and devices on an unpaid financing or installment plan are excluded.

question: What is the mobile device insurance limit on the World card?
reference: Mobile Device Insurance on the Tangerine World Mastercard covers up to CAD 1,000 per claim, depreciating over two years, when the full price is charged to the card.
response: Tangerine World Mastercard — Mobile Device Insurance: Covers loss, theft, or accidental damage of a new mobile device charged to the card. Limit: Up to CAD 1,000 per claim, depreciating over time. Eligibility: Full retail purchase price of the device must be charged to the card.

[kb-10] Tangerine World Mastercard — Travel Medical Insurance: Travel Medical Emergency Insurance provides up to CAD 1,000,000 per insured person for eligible emergency medical expenses during the first 15 days of a trip outside your home province. Coverage applies to cardholders under the age of 65. Pre-existing conditions, trips longer than 15 days, and cardholders aged 65 or older are not covered.

question: What benefits come with the Money-Back card?
reference: The Money-Back Mastercard includes Purchase Assurance, Extended Warranty, and Mastercard Zero Liability fraud protection.
response: The Tangerine Money-Back Mastercard includes: Purchase Assurance, Extended Warranty, Mastercard Zero Liability.
context:
[kb-11] Tangerine World Mastercard — Purchase Assurance and Extended Warranty: The Tangerine World Mastercard includes the same Purchase Assurance (90-day loss, theft, or damage protection up to a CAD 60,000 lifetime maximum) and Extended Warranty (doubles the manufacturer's warranty up to one additional year) as the Money-Back card.
[kb-04] Tangerine Money-Back Mastercard — Extended Warranty: Extended Warranty doubles the original manufacturer's warranty period, up to a maximum of one additional year, on items purchased with the card. The manufacturer's warranty must be five years or less. Coverage is up to the original purchase price. Used items are not eligible.
[kb-05] Tangerine Money-Back Mastercard — Fraud Protection (Zero Liability): Through Mastercard Zero Liability, you are not held responsible for unauthorized transactions made on your account when it is in good standing and you have used reasonable care to protect your card and PIN. Report unauthorized activity promptly. Some commercial or anonymous prepaid cards may be excluded.
[kb-03] Tangerine Money-Back Mastercard — Purchase Assurance: New items bought entirely with the Tangerine Money-Back Mastercard are protected against loss, theft, or damage for the first 90 days from the date of purchase. Coverage is up to the purchase price of the item, subject to a lifetime maximum of CAD 60,000. Vehicles, perishables, and items lost without evidence of theft are excluded.
[kb-01] Tangerine Money-Back Mastercard — Overview: The Tangerine Money-Back Mastercard is a no-annual-fee cash-back card on the Mastercard network. There is no minimum income requirement. You earn 2% cash back in up to two spending categories you choose, and 0.5% cash back on all other purchases. A third 2% category is available if you deposit your reward money into a linked Tangerine Savings Account. Reward money is paid monthly, applied to your card balance or deposited to savings.
[kb-02] Tangerine Money-Back Mastercard — Reward Categories: The selectable 2% categories are: groceries, furniture, restaurants, hotel-motel, gas, recurring bills, drug store, home improvement, entertainment, and public transportation & parking. You may select two categories at the 2% rate. Depositing reward money into a Tangerine Savings Account unlocks a third category at 2%. All non-category spend earns the base rate of 0.5%. There is no cap on the cash back you can earn.
